chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: 4487 - وَ سَأَلَ حَمَّادُ بْنُ عِيسَى أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فَقَالَ لَهُ كَمْ يَتَزَوَّجُ اَلْعَبْدُ قَالَ قَالَ أَبِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ "لاَ يَزِيدُ عَلَى اِمْرَأَتَيْنِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4487 - Hammad ibn Isa asked Abu Abdillah (as) about how many wives can a slave marry?
He (as) said: My father (as) said that Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said: "He may not marry more than two wives."
